description_long: This house features a sprawling, single-story layout with a complex hip roof and multiple gables, giving it a substantial and elegant appearance. The front facade is defined by a wide covered porch supported by columns, with steps leading up to the main entryway. Large windows are arranged in symmetrical rows along the front and sides, providing ample natural light and a balanced aesthetic. The property is surrounded by landscaped elements, including bushes, flower beds, and several mature trees, which add privacy and curb appeal. A driveway leads to a side-attached garage, and a fenced backyard area is visible, suggesting private outdoor space. The exterior materials appear to be a combination of wood siding, stone or brick accents, and asphalt shingles on the roof.
description: A spacious, single-story house with a hip roof, wide covered porch, symmetrical windows, and landscaped surroundings, including a driveway and attached garage.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the wide covered porch, main entry steps, symmetrical windows, and landscaped front yard with a central fountain.
description_view_1: This side view shows the attached garage, driveway, backyard fencing, and additional landscaping along the side of the house.
description_view_2: The rear view is mostly obscured by large trees but reveals the back portion of the roof and hints at a private backyard area.
description_view_3: The opposite side view displays more windows, the side yard, and additional landscaping, with the garage and driveway partially visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Wide covered porch with columns, central steps, and a prominent main door
